name: part_000
file: tmp_【#冥ハロ2025】白上フブキ生誕３DLIVE「冥界Halloween Night!」【白上フブキ⧸ホロライブ】 [7Tm7dVsTPBk]_gemini-3-flash-preview/part_000.webm

scenes.description: Performance intro featuring a montage of characters and background music.
On-screen text introduction for the next segment.
A small mascot character performs the song 'Kinmokusei' (Osmanthus) on a dark stage covered in flowers.

subtitles.original: これは僕らのキセキ。
subtitles.english: This is our miracle.

subtitles.original:
僕とキミと、大切なあのこの
この王国で過ごす、かけがえのない日々を綴る
subtitles.english:
Recounting the irreplaceable days spent in this kingdom
with you, me, and that precious person.

subtitles.original: 僕たちの物語。
subtitles.english: This is our story.

subtitles.original: 僕の居る意味はどこにあるの？
subtitles.english: Where is the meaning of my existence?

subtitles.original: 誰かに必要とされたかった
subtitles.english: I wanted to be needed by someone.

subtitles.original: 夢や希望も捨てきれないけど
subtitles.english: I can't quite throw away my dreams and hopes, but

subtitles.original: なんとなく今を生きている
subtitles.english: I'm just living for now, somehow.

subtitles.original: なんとなく今を生きている
subtitles.english: I'm just living for now, somehow.

subtitles.original: ああ どれだけ叫んでも
subtitles.english: Ah, no matter how much I scream,

subtitles.original: この声は君には届かない
subtitles.english: this voice won't reach you.

subtitles.original: ああ どれだけ叫んでも
subtitles.english: Ah, no matter how much I scream,

subtitles.original: この声は君には届かない
subtitles.english: this voice won't reach you.

subtitles.original: 金木犀の匂いがした
subtitles.english: I smelled the scent of osmanthus.

subtitles.original: 明日のことも忘れたくなった
subtitles.english: I wanted to forget about tomorrow, too.

subtitles.original: いっそ逃げてしまおうかな
subtitles.english: Maybe I should just run away instead.

subtitles.original: 僕は悲劇の主人公だ
subtitles.english: I am the protagonist of a tragedy.

subtitles.original: やさしいヒトで居たいな
subtitles.english: I want to be a kind person.

subtitles.original: でもそんな思いも偽善だ
subtitles.english: But even that thought is hypocrisy.

subtitles.original: 誰も幸せにできないの
subtitles.english: I can't make anyone happy.

subtitles.original: 都合良いね、涙が出るの
subtitles.english: How convenient, the tears are falling.
